title: Panes collapse to a 3-way tab switcher on narrow screens (incl. browser)

tests.summary: 3 passed (desktop 1400/820 split intact + no switcher; mobile 390 3-way switcher toggles panes, real iframe persists across tab switches, 1 tab-open, no overflow)

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (transient cross-session faculties.ts error cleared on re-run)

lint.summary: no lint configured for the fitting UI (esbuild bundle, not under next lint)

codexReview.note: r1 found a real false-positive (e2e never mounted a live iframe -> iframe-persistence untested); fixed (live iframe + same-element/src + single tab-open assertions); r2 clean approve

codexPwTest.note: Codex independently drove desktop 1400 + mobile 390, exercised Browser/Claude tab switching; split on desktop, 3-way switcher + pane toggle on mobile; no console errors

designAudit.notes: 3-way switcher reuses the existing .segmented system (clear green active state); each mobile pane full-screen, no overflow at 390px; browser pane reachable full-width with x correctly hidden on mobile; desktop split visually unchanged. Minor by-design: compact segmented tap height, consistent with the existing dev-tool header.
